Notice And Motion For Order Imposing Sanctions Against Labib Barance For Disobedience Of Discovery Order
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Text Ruling

Notice And Motion For Order Imposing Sanctions Against Deft Edward Novak For Disobedience Of Discovery Order
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Compel Barance Defendants' Responses To Interrogatories, To Doc. Production Requests & To Admissions Request
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:

Christina J. Collins, Esq., for Loren David Gardner, Plaintiff/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling Adopted: Plaintiff Loren Gardner's To Compel Defendants Labib M. Barance's And Majid Labib Barance's Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Admissions, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. The failure of Defendants Labib M. Barance And Majid Labib Barance to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants Labib M. Barance And Majid Labib Barance are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants Labib M. Barance And Majid Labib Barance in the amount of $1,040, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft Novak'S Responses To Interrogatories, To Doc. Production Requests & To Admissions Request
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:

Christina J. Collins, Esq., for Loren David Gardner, Plaintiff/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling Adopted: Plaintiff Loren Gardner's To Compel Defendant Edward Novak's Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Request For Admissions, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Edward Novak's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Edward Novak is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Edward Novak in the amount of $640, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. EVERETT A. HEWLETT
